description: Tasks template for modernization plan. Generate this file alongside plan.md to track individual migration tasks.

tasks.description: Upgrade Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.x and Java from 8 to 21
tasks.reason: The project runs on Java 8 and Spring Boot 2.7.18, both of which are end-of-life. Java 17 is the minimum required for Spring Boot 3.x and for Azure SDK compatibility. Upgrading to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x ensures long-term support, access to modern Azure libraries, and compatibility with the Jakarta EE namespace migration.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.18 to the latest 3.x release. Upgrade Java source/target from 8 to 21. Migrate javax.* imports to jakarta.* where needed. Update any deprecated APIs. Ensure all existing unit tests pass after upgrade.
tasks.taskSummary: Upgraded Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.5.9 and Java from 8 to 21. Migrated javax.* to jakarta.* in Photo.java, modernized API usage in controllers and service. Build and all unit tests pass.

tasks.description: Migrate database layer from Oracle Database to PostgreSQL
tasks.reason: The application uses Oracle Database with Oracle-specific SQL syntax and the Oracle JDBC driver. Oracle is not available as a managed Azure service in the same way PostgreSQL is. Azure Database for PostgreSQL is a fully managed relational database service with excellent Spring Boot support and is the recommended open-source alternative on Azure.
tasks.requirements: Replace Oracle JDBC driver (ojdbc8) with PostgreSQL JDBC driver. Change Hibernate dialect from OracleDialect to PostgreSQLDialect. Rewrite any Oracle-specific native SQL queries to PostgreSQL-compatible SQL (replace ROWNUM with LIMIT/OFFSET, TO_CHAR with EXTRACT, NVL with COALESCE). Update the Photo entity @Lob annotation for PostgreSQL bytea. Replace Oracle TIMESTAMP defaults with CURRENT_TIMESTAMP. Update docker-compose.yml to use postgres image instead of oracle. Update application.properties to use PostgreSQL JDBC URL and driver.
tasks.taskSummary: Migrated database layer from Oracle to PostgreSQL. Replaced ojdbc8 with postgresql JDBC driver, updated Hibernate dialect, rewrote Oracle-specific SQL (ROWNUM→LIMIT, TO_CHAR→EXTRACT, NVL→COALESCE, SYSTIMESTAMP→CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), updated Photo entity @Lob to bytea, replaced oracle docker image with postgres:16, added postgres-init script. Build and all unit tests pass.

tasks.description: Configure connection to Azure Database for PostgreSQL with Managed Identity
tasks.reason: The application currently uses hardcoded username/password credentials for database access. For Azure, Managed Identity provides secure, credential-free authentication to Azure Database for PostgreSQL, eliminating stored passwords and reducing security risk.
tasks.requirements: Add azure-identity-extensions dependency for passwordless PostgreSQL authentication. Update application.properties to configure the PostgreSQL JDBC URL with Azure Managed Identity authentication plugin. Remove hardcoded database credentials from production configuration. Configure connection properties to use DefaultAzureCredential / Managed Identity. Ensure docker-compose.yml retains username/password environment variables for local development.
tasks.environmentConfiguration: PGHOST: Azure Database for PostgreSQL server hostname; PGPORT: PostgreSQL port (default 5432); PGDATABASE: database name
tasks.taskSummary: Configured Azure Database for PostgreSQL with Managed Identity. Added azure-identity-extensions dependency, updated application.properties with AzurePostgresqlAuthenticationPlugin and env-var-based connection config. Local docker profile retains username/password auth. Build and unit tests pass.

tasks.description: Update Dockerfile to use Java 21 runtime
tasks.reason: The existing Dockerfile uses Java 8 (eclipse-temurin:8-jre) for both build and runtime stages. After upgrading the application to Java 21, the Dockerfile must be updated to use Java 21 images to build and run the application correctly.
tasks.requirements: Update the build stage base image from maven:3.9.6-eclipse-temurin-8 to maven:3.9.x-eclipse-temurin-21. Update the runtime stage base image from eclipse-temurin:8-jre to eclipse-temurin:21-jre. Verify the multi-stage build still produces a working jar. Keep the existing EXPOSE 8080 and JAVA_OPTS environment variable.
tasks.taskSummary: Dockerfile already updated to Java 21 during Task 002 (Oracle→PostgreSQL migration). Build stage uses maven:3.9.6-eclipse-temurin-21, runtime stage uses eclipse-temurin:21-jre. EXPOSE 8080 and JAVA_OPTS retained.

tasks.description: Deploy PhotoAlbum application to Azure Container Apps
tasks.reason: The application needs to run on a managed Azure hosting platform to complete the Azure migration. Azure Container Apps provides a fully managed serverless container platform that natively supports Managed Identity, automatic scaling, and integration with Azure Container Registry.
tasks.requirements: Generate Bicep IaC files to provision: Azure Container Apps environment, Azure Container Registry, Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server, and User-Assigned Managed Identity with appropriate role assignments (PostgreSQL login). Configure the Container App with external HTTP ingress on port 8080 and environment variables for database connectivity (PGHOST, PGPORT, PGDATABASE, AZURE_CLIENT_ID). Deploy the containerized application image to the provisioned Azure Container Apps environment.
tasks.taskSummary: Generated Bicep IaC (7 modules) and deployed to Azure Container Apps in Sweden Central (rg-photoalbum-dev). Provisioned: User-Assigned Managed Identity, Log Analytics, ACR, PostgreSQL v17 Flexible Server (Burstable B2s), Container App Environment, Container App. Image built via az acr build (no Docker Desktop). Service Connector configured AAD PostgreSQL user for passwordless auth. App live at https://azca5temr6kkrdrve.jollyhill-c9a3e2ce.swedencentral.azurecontainerapps.io
